Powerful Features

Everything You Need to Run Your Institution

From attendance to accounts, Campus24by7 handles it all. Save time, reduce errors, and focus on what matters — education.

Attendance Automation

Biometric, RFID & app-based attendance tracking for students and staff.

Fee Collection & Reminders

Online/offline fee payments with automated SMS & email reminders.

Salary & Payroll

Automated salary calculation, deductions, and payslip generation.

Transport Management

Route planning, GPS tracking, and transport fee management.

Expense Management

Track all institutional expenses with detailed reports and analytics.

Digital ID Cards

Generate professional ID cards for students and staff instantly.

Report Cards & Exams

Complete exam management with automatic report card generation.

Noticeboard & Communication

Instant notifications to parents, students, and staff via app & SMS.

Timetable Management

Smart scheduling for classes, teachers, and resources.

Inventory Management

Track books, equipment, and supplies with stock alerts.

View All Features
User Portals

Dedicated Portals for Every Stakeholder

Each user gets a personalized dashboard designed for their specific needs and workflows.

Leadership Portal

For Owners & Directors

  • Real-time revenue & expense tracking
  • Multi-branch overview dashboard
  • Performance analytics & reports

Channel Partner Admin

For Partners & Resellers

  • Client management dashboard
  • Commission tracking & reports
  • Support ticket management

Principal Dashboard

For School Heads

  • Staff & student management
  • Academic performance overview
  • Approval workflows & notices

Teacher Portal

For Teaching Staff

  • Attendance marking & reports
  • Grade entry & assessments
  • Class timetable & resources

Parent Portal

For Parents & Guardians

  • Child's attendance & grades
  • Fee payment & receipts
  • Direct teacher communication

Accountant Portal

For Finance Team

  • Fee collection & tracking
  • Expense management
  • Financial reports & ledgers

Student Portal

For Students

  • View attendance & grades
  • Download study materials
  • Check timetable & notices

Uptime

Reduces Workload

Automate repetitive tasks and free up your staff for important work.

Saves Time

Complete tasks in minutes that used to take hours or days.

Prevents Errors

Eliminate manual data entry mistakes with smart automation.

Real-time Analytics

Make data-driven decisions with instant reports and insights.

Works on Any Device

Access your dashboard from desktop, tablet, or mobile phone.

Cloud Secure

Your data is encrypted and backed up on secure cloud servers.

Pricing Plans

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your institution. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

Basic

Perfect for small schools getting started

₹4,999/month
  • Up to 250 students
  • Attendance management
  • Fee collection
  • Basic reports
  • Email support
Start Free Trial
Most Popular

Pro

For growing institutions with advanced needs

₹9,999/month
  • Up to 850 students
  • All Basic features
  • Parent & student portals
  • Salary & payroll
  • Transport management
  • ID Card
  • Exam & report cards
  • SMS notifications
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
Get Started

Enterprise

For large institutions & groups

Custom
  • Unlimited students
  • Multi-branch support
  • Mobile app access
  • All Pro features
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated account manager
  • On-premise deployment option
  • Custom branding
  • 24/7 phone support
  • Training & onboarding
